basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Posts Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 16 June 2026 at https://www.iitr.ac.in/. Candidates who meet the age criteria as specified in the official notification and hold Graduation with 15 years of relevant work experience (for Project Assistant - Admn.) or a 3-year Diploma in Electrical with 15 years of relevant work experience (for Project Assistant - Tech.) can now submit their offline applications from 16 June 2026 to 04 July 2026. Direct links to dow

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation + 15 years working experience as per job description, 3 years Diploma in Electrical + 15 years working experience as per job description
qualification.details: Project Assistant (Admn.): Graduation + 15 years working experience as per job description Project Assistant (Tech.): 3 years Diploma in Electrical + 15 years working experience as per job description

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant (Admn.): Graduation + 15 years working experience as per job description Project Assistant (Tech.): 3 years Diploma in Electrical + 15 years working experience as per job description

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant positions at IIT Roorkee is 04 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant post at IIT Roorkee. These are divided into two categories: Project Assistant (Admn.) and Project Assistant (Tech.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Assistant (Admn.)?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant (Admn.) position, candidates need to have a Graduation degree along with 15 years of working experience as specified in the job description.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Project Assistant (Tech.)?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant (Tech.) role, candidates must possess a 3 years Diploma in Electrical engineering and 15 years of relevant working experience as per the job description.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant roles will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 26,000/- to Rs. 57,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant positions at IIT Roorkee will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant recruitment must be submitted in offline mode. Candidates need to send their completed application forms via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Project Assistants at IIT Roorkee is HRED/R-327/528.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.
